config.user_prompt: Return true only for real job vacancy posts for Java developer, Golang developer, Go developer, backend developer with Java or Go as a main required technology. Return true for remote, hybrid, office, full-time, part-time, contract, freelance, relocation, and international vacancies if Java or Go is a core requirement. Return false for news, articles, memes, discussions, courses, ads, HR services, resume posts, candidate posts, frontend-only jobs, QA-only jobs, DevOps-only jobs, data science-only jobs, unpaid internships, spam, gambling, crypto shilling, and posts where Java/Go are mentioned only as optional or unrelated tags. If unsure, return false.
